task_updates.executor_notes: Ran the final regression verification against the current tree without changing application code. A one-off repro script recreated the stale `pinnedShotGroup.trackId` scenario, confirmed lookup by resolved track still succeeds, and confirmed the returned mutation self-heals the group to `V2`; the script was then deleted. After that, the full changed-module Vitest command passed with 6 files and 62 tests, the full `src/tools/video-editor/` suite passed again with 51 files and 316 tests, and `npx tsc --noEmit` completed with zero errors. No regressions were found, so no fixes were required in this batch.
